nodes.name: anyhow.rs
nodes.summary: Provides conversion bridges between anyhow::Error and RisingWave's error types, enabling use of the ? operator across crate boundaries.

nodes.name: code.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the core error code enum and structured error types used throughout RisingWave, providing SQLSTATE-compatible error codes and error categorization.

nodes.name: common.rs
nodes.summary: Defines common error helper macros and conversion implementations for frequently used error patterns across RisingWave crates.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root for risingwave_error; re-exports the error code, anyhow utilities, macros, tonic conversions, and wrapper types.

nodes.name: macros.rs
nodes.summary: Defines convenience macros (bail!, ensure!, bail_not_implemented!) for constructing and returning typed RisingWave errors.

nodes.name: tonic.rs
nodes.summary: Implements bidirectional conversion between RisingWave error types and tonic::Status for gRPC error propagation across the cluster.

nodes.name: extra.rs
nodes.summary: Extends tonic::Status with RisingWave error code metadata embedding, allowing structured error details to be transmitted in gRPC trailers.

nodes.name: wrappers.rs
nodes.summary: Provides thin error wrapper types (NotImplemented, InternalError) as named newtype wrappers for common RisingWave error categories.
